Jasper, you are amazing just as you are. You do not need to people-please the people who want your company.
Jasper, today can be built gently. Move only the items that help, and leave the rest outside the breathing zone.
Jasper, track feelings, urges, body signals, and DBT skills without people-pleasing the form. Information is enough.
Jasper, write the real version first. DBT worksheets and handouts are here to support you, not judge you.
Jasper, games are allowed to be decompression, regulation, and joy. You do not have to justify needing a break.
Jasper, this page is for softness: pictures, videos, audio, and links that help your brain feel less alone.
